<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? What's missing or awkward today? -->

<!-- What would make this easier? Rough UI/UX or behavior description is fine. -->

<!-- Other approaches you thought of, and why you'd prefer the one above. -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Screenshots, links to similar tools that do this well, etc. -->
